zh.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler是Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory的兒子，於1554年9月10日出生在英國艾可迪德哈姆。他於1573年2月21日與Catherine Fleming在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年8月27日在英國英格蘭艾可享年44歲，埋葬在英國艾可可爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler是Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory的儿子，于1554年9月10日出生在英国艾可迪德哈姆。他于1573年2月21日与Catherine Fleming在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年8月27日在英国英格兰艾可享年44岁，埋葬在英国艾可可爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Pierce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Piers  , borne for example by the Irish-born film actor  Pierce Brosnan  (  b. 1953 ). In many cases it may represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Pearce
meanings: Transferred use of the English surname ; popular among Irish nationalists since the rising of  1916 , led by the writer and educationist Patrick Henry Pearce, who was executed by the British.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler was born on 10 September 1554, in Dedham, Essex, England as the son of Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. He married Catherine Fleming on 21 February 1573, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 August 1599, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Colchester, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler est né le 10 septembre 1554, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, fils de Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. Il a épousé Catherine Fleming le 21 février 1573, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1599, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler wurde am 10. September 1554 in Dedham, Essex, England, als Sohn von Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory geboren. Er hat am 21. Februar 1573 in Dedham, Essex, England Catherine Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1599 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Colchester, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler è nato il il 10 settembre 1554 nel Dedham, Essex, England come figlio di Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. Lui sposato Catherine Fleming il 21 febbraio 1573, nel Dedham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1599, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Colchester, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierce Butlerは1554年9月10日にイギリスエセックスデドハムでThomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossoryの息子として生まれた。1573年2月21日にイギリスエセックスデドハムでCatherine Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年8月27日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで44歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスコルチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler(은)는 1554년 9월 10일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1573년 2월 21일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Catherine Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 코체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.10 September 1554–27 Aug 1599: 10 de setembro de 1554–27 de agosto de 1599
pt.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler nasceu em 10 de setembro de 1554, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. Ele casou-se com Catherine Fleming em 21 de fevereiro de 1573, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1599, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler родился 10 сентября 1554 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. Его отца звали Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Fleming 21 февраля 1573 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 августа 1599 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия.

es.10 September 1554–27 Aug 1599: 10 de septiembre de 1554–27 de agosto de 1599
es.lifeSummary: Pierce Butler nació el 10 de septiembre de 1554, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory. Se casó con Catherine Fleming el 21 de febrero de 1573, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1599, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra.
